description: AccessOwl is an access governance and SaaS management platform for managing employee application access, onboarding and offboarding, approvals, reviews, and related automation. It integrates with SaaS apps, HRIS systems, and collaboration tools such as Slack.
summary: AccessOwl exposes a REST API at https://api.accessowl.com/api/v1 authenticated by AccessOwl-issued bearer API tokens, plus an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://mcp.accessowl.com/mcp.
